case_title: TAME, RODNEY vs. BECERRILL, SERGIO et al

docket_entries.description: JUDGE PRO-TEM CHERYL FRANK, DPADILLA, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ARNOLD EVJE II FOR PLTF, DEFT IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED, TERMS ON THE RECORD, PLTF, TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BECERRILL, SERGIO STOYANOV, GENOVEVA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 602 BRODERICK ST, #1, STAYED UNTIL MAY-28-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, 11:59 PM. NO FURTHER STAYS. IF DEFTS FAIL TO VACATE ON TIME, PLTF MAY AMEND JDMT FOR BACK RENT & DAMAGES, ATTY FEES & COSTS. PLTF TO KEEP SECURITY DEPOSIT. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
